content.en:
Although the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor and the others were high-level people in the Battle Gate, they were not really top-level figures.

A peerless domain ancestor like the Fire Emblem War Ancestor is the true pillar of the Battle Gate, and his status is much higher than theirs.

With the status of the Fire Emblem War Ancestor, it was enough to rank among the top ten in the Battle Gate, so they did not dare to disobey the rank of the Fire Emblem Domain Ancestor.

In this way, the battle gate decided to give Ye Tian the inheritance of many holy skills.

Of course, there is a limit to the number of inheritances of this multi-sect holy skill, and it is impossible to give it indefinitely.

In the end, the high-level leaders of the Battle Gate discussed it and decided to give Ye Tian the inheritance of the Seven Gates, plus the previous Golden Silk Saint Technique, that is, the Eight Gates.

Where are ordinary people eligible to obtain the Eight Sacred Skill Inheritance, even the ordinary Invincible Domain Ancestor may not be able to obtain the Eight Sacred Skill Inheritance, because it is useless to them, they can cultivate a Holy Skill to the realm of Xiaocheng or above in their lifetime, it is quite good.

Therefore, it is also a waste to give them the inheritance of the eight holy skills.

Like Ye Tian, who gave the inheritance of the eight holy techniques, it almost never existed.

-----------------

Warfield.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor came over with a book that recorded the names and general introductions of various holy techniques, and asked Ye Tian to select the seven holy skills to inherit.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, the above has already agreed to your request, but I can only give you seven more saint-level inheritances, this is the limit!

Blood Gang Domain Ancestral Dao.

"Good!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited in his heart.

In fact, he didn't expect to be able to obtain the inheritance of the Seven Holy Techniques at all, he thought that such an excessive request, the Battle Gate would not agree.

Earned!

Immediately, Ye Tian began to select the Holy Technique.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai chose the Seven Holy Techniques.

Holy Skill: Holy Armor, defensive Holy Skill, greatly enhances its own defense, a very common Holy Skill, but it is also a more practical defensive Holy Skill

Holy Skill: Streamer, speed-type holy skill, greatly enhance your own speed, a very common holy skill, once practiced, the speed is invincible

Holy Skill: Extreme, Strength-type Holy Skill, instantly bursting its own power, breaking through defenses, attacking invincible

Holy Skill: Five Elements Ban, Sealing Holy Skill, can seal the enemy's power, can also ban the enemy, prevent others from escaping, the cultivation is very difficult, far beyond the ordinary Holy Skill

Holy Skill: Immortal, Restoration Sacred Skill, once practiced, it is almost immortal and indestructible, it is difficult to be killed, and it is quite difficult to practice

Holy Skill: Royal Body, Amplification Holy Skill, extremely rare, can increase combat power, combined with other Holy Techniques to explode more terrifying strength, the difficulty of cultivation can be called perverted, and few people practice

Holy Skill: Suppressing God, Soul Sacred Skill, can attack the enemy's soul, and can also protect your own soul, extremely rare, the difficulty of cultivation is perverted, and few people can practice

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, this is the Seven Holy Techniques I want!"

After Ye Tian made a choice, he said.

"Well, some of the holy skills you chose are okay, some of the holy skills, even if we are invincible domain ancestors, we can't practice them in a lifetime, it's useless for you to choose them, and when you step into the invincible domain ancestor level in the future, you will regret it!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor persuaded.

After all, he thought that Ye Tian was estimated to be the last time he would obtain the resources of the Battle Gate this time, and he would have to rely on his own efforts to obtain resources in the future.

Because, he didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to enter the pre-Holy War.

If it can't be completed, then there is no way to obtain the resources of the battle gate in the future, so this is the only opportunity to easily obtain the holy skill, even if it is promoted to the invincible domain ancestor level in the future, there may not be a chance to choose the holy skill again.

"I've already decided, just these seven holy skills!"

Ye Tian decided.

For others, the difficulty of cultivating some holy skills is indeed perverted, but he has the corresponding holy endowment, so he can naturally practice it easily.

Otherwise, why would he be so stupid as to choose these seven holy techniques?

"Okay, then I'll apply for it and bring you these seven holy skills!"

Blood Gang Domain Ancestral Dao.

"Okay, thank you Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Not long after, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor came back, but this time it was three Invincible Domain Ancestors who came, obviously these seven holy skills were extremely precious, and the battle gate was also afraid that the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor would swallow these seven holy skills alone, so the three Invincible Domain Ancestors came together to supervise the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor.

Under the supervision of the three Invincible Domain Ancestors, Ye Tian inherited these seven holy techniques.

At this point, Ye Tian had eight holy skills.

Once he has these eight holy skills, he is enough to attack the first place in the holy war.

In the past, he was worried that he would expose his holy skills and the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, but this time the Battle Gate would inevitably let him cast the Eternal Immortal Holy Body.

Since the Eternal Immortal Holy Body was exposed, it didn't matter if he exposed the Holy Technique.

Perhaps he has practiced the Holy Skill, and he will expose the fact that he has the Holy Endowment.

In a sense, others may still be afraid of him.

Because he possessed the Holy Endowment, these forces would guess that his parents were Supreme Domain Ancestors.

The Supreme Domain Ancestors are not all in the Dark Forbidden Domain, the Dark Forbidden Domain is too big, the Dark Sacred Domain is just one of the most prosperous territories in the Dark Forbidden Domain, but in fact, in the endless area of the Dark Forbidden Domain, there are many Supreme Domain Ancestors, scattered everywhere.

Therefore, if he exposes the Holy Endowment, others may not dare to attack him, for fear of being attacked by the two Supreme Domain Ancestors.

Even the Holy Gate didn't dare not care about the two Supreme Domain Ancestors, if they could not offend, they would naturally not be offended.

Moreover, once he exposes the Holy Endowment, the Battle Gate will only protect him more, value him, and vigorously cultivate him.

With his talent, coupled with the cultivation of the Battle Gate, he can definitely grow up in a short period of time, and there is no need to be afraid of other forces.

Therefore, once it is time for the Holy War, he will no longer hide his strength, and he will win the first place in the Holy War with the most powerful attitude, and his reputation will be shocked by the entire Dark Sanctuary.

This time.

Ye Tian obtained the inheritance of the seven holy techniques, and also obtained a lot of resources to assist in the cultivation of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, as well as treasures that could quickly fuse the Forbidden Dao and the Flesh Dao.

In the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, there are almost no treasures that fuse the Forbidden Dao and the Flesh Dao, but there are quite a few in the Dark Sanctuary, although they are also very precious, but to forces like the Battle Gate, they are nothing.

After obtaining these treasures, Ye Tian began to comprehend and cultivate.

First of all, he needs to raise his cultivation to the Perfection Realm of the Unified Realm, and the other people who participate in the Holy War will inevitably be the Perfection of the Unified Realm, and if his cultivation is poor, the impact will inevitably be great.

Therefore, cultivation must first be promoted.

With the treasures provided by the Battle Gate, it only took Ye Tian tens of thousands of years to successfully elevate his cultivation to the perfection of the Unified Realm, and the Flesh Dao and the Forbidden Dao were completely fused by ten percent.

At this time, as long as he comprehended the complete domain ancestor mysteries, he could directly impact the domain ancestor level.

However, if he attacked the Domain Ancestor now, the Battle Gate would kill him.

After cultivating to reach the consummation of the Unified Realm, Ye Tian began to fully comprehend that sect holy technique, occasionally using the large number of treasures that assisted the holy body to cultivate the eternal immortal holy body.

The Eternal Immortal Holy Body has reached the realm of Dacheng, and it is indeed difficult to ascend to the realm of perfection, and 5 million years may not be enough, but Dacheng and Dacheng are also different.

For example, in the early stage of Dacheng, in the middle stage of Dacheng, in the late stage of Dacheng, and at the peak of Dacheng, these four realms, even if they are only promoted to a small level, their strength will be greatly improved.

Ye Tian's goal was to raise the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the late stage of Dacheng realm before the Holy War began.

As the days passed, coupled with the million-fold acceleration of time, Ye Tian's progress was very fast.

As time passed, a holy skill was introduced.

In addition, Ye Tian often took treasures that enhanced his comprehension, so the speed of comprehension was faster, completely regardless of the consumption of resources.

It can be said that the value of these treasures he consumes can be exchanged for one forbidden realm, or even multiple forbidden realms.

In the blink of an eye, 500,000 years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian's other holy technique has been cultivated to the Dacheng realm, this holy technique is the Streamer Holy Technique, this is the effect of cultivating regardless of resources.

This is still his cultivation of other holy skills, otherwise it will not take 500,000 years at all, and I am afraid that 100,000 years can be completed.

In the following years, almost every few hundred thousand years, Ye Tian cultivated a holy technique to the Dacheng realm, and the other holy techniques would also improve one by one, either at the peak of entry, or at the Xiaocheng realm, almost at the same time.

However, some holy techniques were indeed difficult, and it took Ye Tian a long time.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian had been practicing penance for 3 million years.

At this time, he had already cultivated the four holy techniques to the Dacheng realm, but the other three holy techniques were barely successful, and the cultivation speed was very slow, and the cultivation of these three holy skills was too difficult.

And the Eternal Immortal Holy Body was also cultivated by Ye Tian to the middle stage of Xiaocheng, and his progress was not slow.

"I hope that in the next 2 million years, I will be able to cultivate all my holy skills to the Dacheng realm, and then cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the late Dacheng realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And when Ye Tian was cultivating, the battle gate also quarreled many times because of Ye Tian's affairs, because Ye Tian consumed resources too quickly, and the resources provided to Ye Tian were enough to cultivate dozens of holy sons, and it was to support dozens of holy sons to become domain ancestor levels.

However, the Fire Emblem Domain Ancestor at the top didn't speak, and they didn't dare to cut off Ye Tian's resources, so they could only continue to supply.

But if Ye Tian did not perform well in the Holy War, they would not only cut off Ye Tian's resources, but would even remove Ye Tian as the Holy Son.

The years have passed.

In the blink of an eye, another 2 million years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Immortal Holy Body had already reached the late stage of Dacheng realm, and six of the seven holy techniques he had obtained had reached the Dacheng realm, leaving only the imperial body, a holy skill, which had not yet been cultivated to the Dacheng realm.

This holy skill is very important, it is an incomparably rare amplification holy skill, once it reaches the realm of Dacheng, it will help Ye Tian's strength too much, and the amplification effect is very considerable.

"Quick!"

"There are still three years left before the holy war, and we must break through the !! during this time"

Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, the people from the Battle Gate had already come to urge him several times to report and get acquainted with the other Holy Sons of the Battle Gate, but he ignored them and was still in retreat.

If it weren't for the people of the Battle Gate who knew that he was in retreat in the War Realm, I am afraid that they would think that he was going to give up the war.

Another year has passed.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian finally comprehended the most critical step, completely broke the shackles, and comprehended the holy technique of the imperial body to the realm of Dacheng.

At this moment, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

"Now, I have eight holy skills, and the eight holy skills are complete, and the late stage realm of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body is much stronger than other people's Holy Body Consummation level, and I also have the power of the Extreme Dao, with my current strength, I can easily kill the average top domain ancestor in seconds!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

Of course, what is the specific strength, he doesn't have time to experiment now.

Wow!

Ye Tian is out of customs!

For the first time, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor appeared.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, you are finally out of the customs, if you don't go out again, I'm afraid I'm going to forcibly let you out!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said with a smile.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I'm ready!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly, his body was full of endless confidence.

"Let's go, I'll take you to the Holy War Realm of the Battle Realm Tower, where cultivators of all cultivation levels are allowed to enter without any restrictions!"

Blood Gang Domain Ancestral Dao.

Wow!

In a flash, Ye Tian had been brought into the Holy War Realm by the Gang Domain Ancestor and came to the Battle Gate Base.

At this time, he felt a large number of terrifying aura, all of them were domain ancestors, and some of them could annihilate him at the slightest trace of the aura, and he was definitely the big man among the domain ancestors.

In addition, Ye Tian also saw the ontology of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, a powerful existence at the level of the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Feeling a trace of aura on the other party's body, Ye Tian was also extremely shocked in his heart.

"It's so strong!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He is afraid that he is ten thousand times stronger, and he is not as good as the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor.

"Let's go, I'll take you to meet the participants of this year's battle gate, you and they can get acquainted with each other!"

Blood Gang Domain Ancestral Dao.

"Okay!"

Ye Tian nodded.
